The '''''Gorgon''''' was [[Daxtorn Lethos]]'s personal [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. It was a heavily-armed [[INT-66]], modified to have faster engines, which Daxtorn used for [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]].<ref name="Enemies for Life" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|4|Enemies for Life|reprint=1}}
